methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series D → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.5x) to $125M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $529M - $5.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 22.3x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: SambaNova Systems
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series D), post-money $5B

private.name: Tenstorrent
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series D), post-money $2.7B

data.narrative:
Mythic is a Series D chip design company that has raised $125M to date. The valuation analysis draws from a universe of 3 public semiconductor comparables (ALAB, NVDA, AMD) and 8 private frontier-chip peers, with direct stage-matched comps including SambaNova Systems ($5.0B Series D), Tenstorrent ($2.7B Series D), and DEEPX ($529M Series C).

Two quantitative methods triangulate the valuation. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.5x step-up multiplier to the $125M raised proxy, implying $188M. Peer-median analysis across the 3 same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables yields a median of $2.7B, with a range spanning $529M to $5.0B. Public-comp anchoring via P/S multiples (sector median 22.3x) cannot be applied due to absence of disclosed revenue data, typical for private companies.

The triangulated valuation range is $159M (low) to $3.1B (high), with a median of $1.4B. The wide spread reflects material dispersion within the peer set—particularly the gap between DEEPX and SambaNova—and the absence of revenue visibility to refine the multiple-based approach. Key uncertainties include Mythic's actual revenue run-rate, relative go-to-market momentum versus named peers, and whether capital raised-to-date translates to comparable product maturity or traction as SambaNova or Tenstorrent.
